name: Recent Code Review
description: Review commits from the past day and provide feedback on code quality
prompt:
Review all commits from the past 24 hours on branch {{branch}}:

1. Read each changed file and understand the intent of the changes
2. Check for security vulnerabilities (OWASP Top 10)
3. Identify performance issues or anti-patterns
4. Verify error handling is adequate
5. Check test coverage for the changes

Provide a structured review with severity levels:
- CRITICAL: Must address immediately
- WARNING: Should address soon
- INFO: Suggestions for improvement

Date: {{date}}
